name: the-go-giver-influencer
description: Bob Burg and John David Mann's The Go-Giver Influencer — build genuine influence through giving value, finding the third way beyond win-lose, and leading through service
useCase: Helps anyone build genuine influence in their relationships, negotiations, and leadership by focusing on adding value, empathetic persuasion, and finding win-win solutions.
knownRisks: The Go-Giver approach requires a genuine shift in mindset — surface-level application won't produce results
